description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Common build & test workflow that accepts four inputs: install-name, os, build, and compiler. The workflow runs on a job named ci with the specified os and sets environment variables CC and CXX based on the compiler input. It checks out the repository, installs prerequisites, creates a build directory, configures CMake with the specified build type and warning settings, builds the project, runs tests, and installs and uninstalls the project.
